pages.text:
INTRODUCTION
CharCoat Passive Fire Protection was formed over
20 years ago in Australia for the then emerging Cable
Coating and firestopping Market.
Specializing in protective coatings and firestop
products. We positioned ourselves as an advance
technology company focused on the protection of
electrical cables, eventually branching out to
encompass Electrical Insulators, Thin Film Insulation
and Structural Steel Fire Protection, with other
protective coatings always under development.
We have now far surpassed our competitors,
creating one of the most Superior Cable Coatings
(CharCoat CC) on the market today rated to 1100°C
for 90 minutes, QUV and Radiant approvals and
marine approvals pending. Coupled with our 4 hour Firestopping Range and capability to produce or procure any product,
we have become one of the leading brands in the market today.
Our mission at CharCoat Passive Fire Protection is to manufacture and supply our clients with the most technologically
advanced coatings and firestopping products for the protection against fire. By securing our client’s assets and safeguarding
the functionality of their facilities, we aim to assist with their financial goals without the burden of fire, downtime, loss of
revenue and insurance costs.
OUR PASSIVE FIRE PROTECTION PRODUCTS ARE USED IN THE FOLLOWING SECTORS
INDUSTRIAL INSTITUTIONAL
Power Plants & Substations Hospitals
Petrochemical (Oil & Gas) Public Buildings
Mines Airports
Smelters
Process Industries
Warehousing
OFFSHORE & MARINE RESIDENTIAL
Platforms Apartments
Shipping Condominiums
FSO & FPSO High-rise Buildings
Harbours & Ports Low-rise Buildings
COMMERCIAL WE ALSO SUPPLIES THE FOLLOWING SERVICES
TO SUPPORT OUR PRODUCTS:
High-rise Offices
: Estimation Services (BOQ Only)
Hotels
: Project Pre-Inspection
Shopping Centers
: Project Management
Entertainment Centers : Supervision
Resorts : PFP Applicators (sprayers)
: PFP Applicators and Equipment / Equipment technicians
: QA / ITP (Inspection and Test Plan)

images.context_text: INTRODUCTION CharCoat Passive Fire Protection was formed over 20 years ago in Australia for the then emerging Cable Coating and firestopping Market. Specializing in protective coatings and firestop products. We positioned ourselves as an advance technology company focused on the protection of electrical cables, eventually branching out to encompass Electrical Insulators, Thin Film Insulation and Structural Steel Fire Protection, with other protective coatings always under development. We have now far surpassed our competitors, creating one of the most Superior Cable Coatings (CharCoat CC) on the market today rated to 1100°C for 90 minutes, QUV and Radiant approvals and marine approvals pending. Coupled with our 4 hour Firestopping Range and capability to produce or procure any product, we have become one of the leading brands in the market today. Our mission at CharCoat Passive Fire Protection is to manufacture and supply our clients with the most technologically advanced coatings and firestopping products for the protection against fire. By securing our client’s assets and safeguarding the functionality of their facilities, we aim to assist with their financial goals without the burden of fire, downtime, loss of revenue and insurance costs. OUR PRODUCTS
CharCoat CC CharCoat 1709
A ninety (90) minute IEC, ASTM, UL CharCoat 1709 is our 5 hour Fire
Approved Hydrocarbon Fire Rated Rated Epoxy Intumescent Coating
Coating for the protection of for the protection of Structural
electrical cables. Steel in hydrocarbon environ-
ments. Tested and approved to
UL1709. This is an ideal solution for
Steel Fire Protection within the
pretrochemical industry.
CharCoat JF CharCoat SC
Is our revolutionary new Hydrocarbon CharCoat SC is a 2 hour Fire Rated
Jet Fire Rated Coating which is a 2 Thin Film Intumescent Coatings for
component 100% epoxy based the protection of Structural Steel.
intumescent, 100% solvents free. Tested and approved to BS476, Part
Suitable for the protection of steel, 21 and UL263. This is an ideal
aluminium or composites from solution for Steel Fire Protection.
Cellulosic to Hydrocarbon Pool and
Jet Fires.
CharCoat CTI CharCoat IC
An all new Ceramic Thermal A unique room temperature RTV
Insulation Coating that is sprayed Silicone applied to ceramic Insulators
direct to the substrate to provide to prevent pollution flashovers of
superior insulation. Whether it be High Voltage Insulation.
piping, tanks, transport, roofing or
walls.
CharCoat Firestopping
Our four (4) hour fire and insulation rated firestop products
including IS Sealant, FP Panel and FM Mortar. Used in com-
bination to establishes a unique fire rated system in the
PFP market place.
